snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene plays a role in DNA interstrand cross-link repair and encodes a protein with 5' flap endonuclease and 5'-3' exonuclease activity. Mutations in this gene cause karyomegalic interstitial nephritis. Alternatively spliced transcript variants encoding distinct isoforms have been described.

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.2199(6356/28908), 0.5705(61959/108604) in the gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or gnomADe databases(data in the iJGVD database fail the filter); this variant is reported as Benign in the ClinVar database(ID=1227432, review status: one star). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.2199(6356/28908), 0.5705(61959/108604) in the gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or gnomADe databases(data in the iJGVD database fail the filter); the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.gene_function: FAN1基因在DNA的跨链修复中起作用，编码一个具有5'皮瓣核酸内切酶和5'-3'外切酶活性的蛋白质。FAN1基因突变可引起核型巨核间质性肾炎。另外，还描述了编码不同亚型的剪接转录变体。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为内含子区突变。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2199（6356/28908）、0.5705（61959/108604），1000G、ExAC、gnomADe数据库无记录（iJGVD数据库数据未通过过滤标准）；ClinVar数据库报道为Benign（ID=1227432，可靠度为一颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is located in the intron of the gene.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2199（6356/28908）、0.5705（61959/108604），1000G、ExAC、gnomADe数据库无记录（iJGVD数据库数据未通过过滤标准）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene plays a role in DNA interstrand cross-link repair and encodes a protein with 5' flap endonuclease and 5'-3' exonuclease activity. Mutations in this gene cause karyomegalic interstitial nephritis. Alternatively spliced transcript variants encoding distinct isoforms have been described.

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.4571(2289/5008), 0.4755(57722/121392), 0.4862(122200/251342), 0.3962(12411/31328), 0.8654(93983/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as Benign in the ClinVar database(ID=260491, review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.4571(2289/5008), 0.4755(57722/121392), 0.4862(122200/251342), 0.3962(12411/31328), 0.8654(93983/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 6 times of amino acid change at the FAN1 protein position 1005, of which the mutant H1005= is recorded 6 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.

snvindel.gene_function: GREM1基因属于原癌基因，编码蛋白是一种神经母细胞瘤的鉴别筛选基因（DAN）家族骨形态发生蛋白（BMP）的拮抗剂，编码蛋白通过拮抗BMP信号传导来调节肢体和肾脏发育 （PMID: 25592806），并参与细胞增殖 （PMID: 23394397） 和上皮间质转化 （PMID: 23548835）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为同义突变。

snvindel.gene_function_en: GREM1, gremlin 1, DAN family BMP antagonist, regulates limb and kidney development through antagonizing BMP signaling (PMID: 25592806), and is involved in cell proliferation (PMID: 23394397) and epithelial-mesenchymal transition (PMID: 23548835).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2598(1301/5008), 0.3569(43323/121388), 0.3605(90634/251442), 0.3189(9989/31328), 0.2849(30946/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=257484) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 14 times of amino acid change at the FANCI protein position 86, of which the mutant A86V is recorded 13 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.2598(1301/5008), 0.3569(43323/121388), 0.3605(90634/251442), 0.3189(9989/31328), 0.2849(30946/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 14 times of amino acid change at the FANCI protein position 86, of which the mutant A86V is recorded 13 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.gene_function: FANCI是范可尼贫血蛋白I，是ATM/ATR激酶的靶标，与FANCD2相互作用以调节DNA修复（PMID: 17412408）；其基因突变在侵袭性乳腺癌（PMID: 26296701） 和三阴性乳腺癌 （PMID: 26824983）中均有报道。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第86位氨基酸由丙氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2598（1301/5008）、0.3569（43323/121388）、0.3605（90634/251442）、0.3189（9989/31328）、0.2849（30946/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=257484）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录14次FANCI蛋白第86位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A86V记录13次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 86th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Alanine to Valine.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2598（1301/5008）、0.3569（43323/121388）、0.3605（90634/251442）、0.3189（9989/31328）、0.286（22147/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录6次FANCI蛋白第86位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: FANCI, Fanconi anemia group I protein, is an ATM/ATR kinase target that interacts with FANCD2 to regulate DNA repair (PMID: 17412408). FANCI mutations have been identified in patients with invasive breast cancer (PMID: 26296701) and triple-negative receptor breast cancer (PMID: 26824983).

snvindel.gene_function: SLX4基因编码SLX4蛋白，SLX4蛋白参与与DNA损伤修复相关的各种过程。SLX4蛋白定位于DNA上的双链断裂（DSB），通过招募参与DNA修复和基因组稳定性的蛋白质形成多蛋白复合物，如ERCC1/ERCC4和SLX1核酸内切酶、MSH2/MSH3错配修复复合物和端粒TRF2等（PMID: 19596235, PMID: 19596236, PMID: 19595721, PMID: 19595722）。SLX4对部分类型的DNA修复至关重要，包括DNA链间交联（ICLs）、霍利迪连接（HJ）解析和端粒稳态（PMID: 24938228）。SLX4蛋白在各种肿瘤中突变频率较低，该基因的胚系突变是范可尼贫血互补组P（FANCP）的原因（PMID: 21240275, PMID: 21240277）。SLX4被认为是家族性非BRCA1/2突变型乳腺癌患者的一种假定遗传因素，但尚未被研究证实（PMID: 22911665, PMID: 22401137, PMID: 21805310, PMID: 23211700）。

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC4基因编码的蛋白质与ERCC1形成复合物，参与核苷酸切除修复过程中的5'切口。该复合物是一种与EME1相互作用的结构特异性DNA修复内切酶。该基因缺陷是着色性干皮病互补组F（xp-f）或着色性干皮病VI（xp6）的原因。

snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC4 (also known as XPF) is a DNA endonuclease protein that is active when in a complex in ERCC1 (PMID: 22101340, 9525876). The ERCC4-ERCC1 complex is required to cut at the junction between double stranded and single stranded DNA and has important functions in nucleotide excision repair, DNA double-strand break repair, and DNA interstrand crosslinks repair (PMID: 22101340, 9525876). Hereditary mutations in ERCC4 have been identified in skin-photosensitive and DNA repair deficient disorders including xeroderma pigmentosum, Cocakyane synrome, XFE progeroid syndrome and Fanconi Anemia (PMID: 23623386, 23623389). Somatic ERCC4 mutations are rare in cancer, however, loss-of-function germline ERCC4 mutations can cause a predisposition for cancer (PMID: 22941649, 24465539). ERCC4-mutant cell are sensitive to DNA damaging reagents due to deficiencies in DNA repair pathways (PMID: 26074087).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1508(755/5008), 0.1176(12830/109096), 0.1045(26075/249632), 0.1289(4042/31364), 0.2019(21923/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=126613) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing; the ClinGen Expert Panel concluded from the results of the available functional study experiments that missense mutations in the PALB2 gene are extremely unlikely to cause disease.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.1508(755/5008), 0.1176(12830/109096), 0.1045(26075/249632), 0.1289(4042/31364), 0.2019(21923/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as no effect  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 108 times of amino acid change at the PALB2 protein position 559, of which the mutant Q559R is recorded 107 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.gene_function: PALB2基因属于抑癌基因，编码DNA修复因子和BRCA2结合蛋白（PMID: 16793542）。PALB2蛋白在同源重组途径中充当支架蛋白，参与修复双链DNA断裂，可在受损基因座上介导BRCA2蛋白和RAD51蛋白的募集（PMID: 19423707）。PALB2蛋白还与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，在同源重组途径中充当BRCA1蛋白和BRCA2蛋白之间的中介因子（PMID: 19268590, PMID: 19584259）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第559位氨基酸由谷氨酰胺突变为精氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1508（755/5008）、0.1176（12830/109096）、0.1045（26075/249632）、0.1289（4042/31364）、0.2019（21923/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=126613）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接；ClinGen专家组根据现有功能研究实验结果认为PALB2基因错义突变的致病可能性极低。

snvindel.gene_function_en: This intronless gene encodes the receptor protein for melanocyte-stimulating hormone (MSH). The encoded protein, a seven pass transmembrane G protein coupled receptor, controls melanogenesis. Two types of melanin exist: red pheomelanin and black eumelanin. Gene mutations that lead to a loss in function are associated with increased pheomelanin production, which leads to lighter skin and hair color. Eumelanin is photoprotective but pheomelanin may contribute to UV-induced skin damage by generating free radicals upon UV radiation. Binding of MSH to its receptor activates the receptor and stimulates eumelanin synthesis. This receptor is a major determining factor in sun sensitivity and is a genetic risk factor for melanoma and non-melanoma skin cancer. Over 30 variant alleles have been identified which correlate with skin and hair color, providing evidence that this gene is an important component in determining normal human pigment variation.

The Cancer Hotspots database has no record for this variant. Based on the prediction tools REVEL and aGVGD, this variant is considered neutral, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: TP53, cellular tumor antigen p53, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in cell cycle arrest and apoptosis, and is the most frequently mutated gene in cancer (PMID: 10065147, PMID: 22713868). TP53 germline mutations are common in Li-Fraumeni syndrome (PMID: 30239254) and somatic missense mutations are frequent in almost all cancer types cancers (PMID: 30224644) and are also implicated in chemoresistance (PMID: 9927204, PMID: 24065105, PMID: 27066457).

snvindel.gene_function: BRCA1基因属于抑癌基因（PMID: 30562755），其编码的蛋白主要参与DNA的损伤修复，因此BRCA1基因在维持DNA的结构和完整性上具有重要作用（PMID: 21203981）。

This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA1 gene, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.5439(2724/5008), 0.41(49762/121356), 0.4038(101374/251034), 0.4842(15168/31324), 0.328(35576/108448) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 62 times of amino acid change at the BRCA1 protein position 871, of which the mutant P871L is recorded 57 times. This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA1 gene, based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.gene_function: BRCA1基因属于抑癌基因（PMID: 30562755），其编码的蛋白主要参与DNA的损伤修复，因此BRCA1基因在维持DNA的结构和完整性上具有重要作用（PMID: 21203981）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第871位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.5439（2724/5008）、0.41（49762/121356）、0.4038（101374/251034）、0.4842（15168/31324）、0.328（35576/108448）；BRCAExchange数据库专家组复核为Benign / Little Clinical Significance，ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=41812）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。该变异位于BRCA1基因重要功能域之外，基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 871st amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Leucine.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.5439（2724/5008）、0.41（49762/121356）、0.4038（101374/251034）、0.4842（15168/31324）、0.328（35576/108448）；COSMIC数据库记录58次BRCA1蛋白第871位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L记录53次。该变异位于BRCA1基因重要功能域之外，基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function: RNF43，无名指蛋白43，是一种E3泛素连接酶，靶向Frizzled受体，导致Frizzled的溶酶体降解和Wnt信号的负调控（PMID: 25460271）。RNF43突变与多种肿瘤类型有关，在结直肠癌和子宫内膜癌中很常见（PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第117位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2262（1133/5008）、0.1641（19089/116342）、0.1578（38482/243942）、0.1515（4739/31272）、0.3276（35581/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=1165517）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录104次RNF43蛋白第117位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R117H记录12次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 117th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Histidine.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2262（1133/5008）、0.1641（19089/116342）、0.1578（38482/243942）、0.1515（4739/31272）、0.3283（25426/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录82次RNF43蛋白第117位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H记录10次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RNF43, ring finger protein 43, is an E3 ubiquitin ligase that targets Frizzled receptors, resulting in lysosomal degradation of Frizzleds and negative regulation of Wnt signaling (PMID: 25460271). RNF43 mutations are associated with several tumor types, and are frequent in colorectal and endometrial cancer (PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.6208(3109/5008), 0.5941(71880/120986), 0.5993(149716/249818), 0.5836(18278/31322), 0.7733(83982/108598) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=183702) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.gene_function: BRIP1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是RecQ DEAH解旋酶家族的成员，参与DNA受损修复过程。BRIP1蛋白与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，共同修补受损的DNA链，从而阻止细胞内积累过多可能触发其分裂失控的基因损伤。

snvindel.gene_function_en: BRIP1, BRCA1 interacting protein C-terminal helicase 1, is involved in DNA repair and aids the tumor suppressor function of Brca1 (PMID: 14983014). BRIP1 germline mutations are associated with breast and ovarian cancers and somatic mutations are highest in endometrial, colon, and NSCLC (PMID: 27283171).

Inactivation of PRKAR1A is associated with Carney complex (PMID: 20301463) and adrenocortical tumors (PMID: 26042218).

snvindel.gene_function: RHBDF2属于一个保守的抑制性菱形样假蛋白酶家族，其缺乏必需的催化残基并抑制菱形依赖性EGF信号传导（PMID: 21439629），其相关病症为酪氨酸伴食管癌（OMIM）。分子机制研究表明，RHBDF2激活丝裂原活化蛋白激酶7（mitogen-activated protein kinase 3， MAP7K21）依赖性通路，促进肝脂肪变性。此外，RHBDF2激活肿瘤坏死因子（TNF）-α和表皮生长因子受体（EGFR）信号传导，增强狼疮性肾炎。RHBDF2高表达可诱导EGFR、WNT和转化生长因子（TGF）-β信号传导增强，与宫颈癌预后不良显著相关。此外，RHBDF2过表达激活TGF-β信号传导，增强胃癌癌细胞的侵袭性（PMID: 36943228）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第179位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为亮氨酸。

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.7652（3832/5008）、0.8787（102832/117034）、0.8855（211523/238886）、0.8105（25348/31274）、0.8641（93841/108596）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具BayesDel认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RHBDF2 belongs to a conserved family of inhibitory rhomboid-like pseudoproteases that lack essential catalytic residues and inhibit rhomboid-dependent EGF signaling （PMID: 21439629）.Several recent studies have suggested that RHBDF2 is significantly upregulated in tumors and has pro‐tumor effects. Molecular mechanism studies have shown that RHBDF2 activates the mitogen‐activated protein kinase 7 (MAP3K7)‐dependent pathway and promotes hepatic steatosis. Furthermore, RHBDF2 activates tumor necrosis factor (TNF)‐α, and epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) signaling and enhances lupus nephritis. High RHBDF2 expression can induce enhanced EGFR, WNT and transforming growth factor (TGF)‐β signaling, and was dramatically linked to poor prognosis of cervical cancer. Additionally, RHBDF2 overexpression activated TGF‐β signaling and enhanced the aggressiveness of cancer cells in gastric cancer. Recent studies have shown that RHBDF2 has a critical impact on the immune regulation of disease. Therefore, RHBDF2 has a multifaceted influence on the tumor immune microenvironment, which has a pro‐tumor effect（PMID：36943228）.

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC2是ERCC切除修复2TFIIH核心复合解旋酶亚基，是一种依赖于ATP的5’-3’DNA解旋酶，在核苷酸切除修复，RNA转录和染色体分离中起作用（PMID: 20797633）。 ERCC2变异与胃癌（PMID: 24338713）和肺癌（PMID: 20627704）的易感性有关，ERCC2体细胞突变导致的功能丧失可能赋予对顺铂（PMID: 29980530）的敏感性。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第231位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为蛋氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0001594（5/31358）、0.0001197（13/108604），ExAC、gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.001631（14/8584）、0.001687（31/18376），1000G数据库EAS_CHB人群等位基因频率为0.009709（2/206）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=329526）的胚系突变分类为Uncertain significance（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为disease-causing，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 231st amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Methionine.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0001594（5/31358）、0.0001197（13/108604），ExAC、gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.001631（14/8584）、0.001687（31/18376），1000G数据库EAS_CHB人群等位基因频率为0.009709（2/206）；COSMIC数据库记录6次ERCC2蛋白第231位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V231M记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为disease-causing，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC2, ERCC excision repair 2 TFIIH core complex helicase subunit, is an ATP-dependent 5’-3’ DNA helicase that plays a role in nucleotide excision repair, RNA transcription, and chromosome segregation (PMID: 20797633). ERCC2 variants have been associated with susceptibility to gastric cancer (PMID: 24338713) and lung cancer (PMID: 20627704) and somatic Ercc2 loss of function mutations may confer sensitivity to cisplatin (PMID: 29980530).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.6362(3186/5008), 0.5898(70723/119908), 0.5796(144875/249946), 0.6452(20195/31302), 0.471(51156/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=256021) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC1，ERCC切除修复酶1，内切酶非催化亚基，是构成内切酶复合物的一部分，在DNA修复中发挥作用（PMID: 26074087）。ERCC1的表达水平与各种类型的肿瘤，包括卵巢癌、非小细胞肺癌和头颈癌对基于铂类的疗法的响应相关（PMID: 26804248, PMID: 26179868, PMID: 26870207）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC1, ERCC excision repair 1, endonuclease non-catalytic subunit, forms part of an endonuclease complex that functions in DNA repair (PMID: 26074087). ERCC1 expression level has been correlated with response to platinum-based therapies in various tumor types, including ovarian, non-small cell lung, and head and neck cancers (PMID: 26804248, PMID: 26179868, PMID: 26870207).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 1.0(5008/5008), 1.0(120931/120934), 1.0(249433/249436), 1.0(31400/31400) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=133599) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the ASXL1 protein position 815, of which the mutant L815P is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: ASXL1是转录调节因子，参与基因表达的表观遗传调控，并与几种蛋白质形成复合物以调控转录（PMID: 23736028）。ASXL1突变在慢性粒细胞单核细胞白血病中很常见（PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028），并且已在许多不同的肿瘤类型包括急性髓细胞性白血病和肝癌（PMID: 23736028）中被报道。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第815位氨基酸由亮氨酸突变为脯氨酸。
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为1.0（5008/5008）、1.0（120931/120934）、1.0（249433/249436）、1.0（31400/31400），iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=133599）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录19次ASXL1蛋白第815位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L815P记录15次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 815th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Leucine to Proline.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为1.0（5008/5008）、1.0（120931/120934）、1.0（249433/249436）、1.0（31400/31400），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录19次ASXL1蛋白第815位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L815P记录15次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ASXL1, additional sex combs like 1, transcriptional regulator, is involved in epigenetic regulation of gene expression and forms complexes with several proteins to regulate transcription (PMID: 23736028). Mutations in ASXL1 are frequent in chronic myelomonocytic leukemia (PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028), and have been identified in a number of different tumor types including acute myeloid leukemia and liver cancer (PMID: 23736028).

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function: GNAS基因属于原癌基因。编码蛋白作为一个重要的信号转导蛋白，主要功能是在G蛋白偶联受体信号转导途径中，激活腺苷酸环化酶，导致cAMP水平的升高，参与调控细胞生长和细胞分裂。

snvindel.gene_function_en: GNAS, GNAS complex locus, is a GTPase that is activated upon ligand binding of a G-protein coupled receptor, and is involved in mediating hormone response (PMID: 23640210, PMID: 25851935). Hotspot mutations impair Gnas GTPase activity, resulting in constitutive pathway activation and are common in a variety of tumor types (PMID: 23640210).

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可以拆成2个位点，分别为位点1（2-215632255-C-T，c.1519G>A(p.Val507Met)）、位点2（2-215632256-A-G，c.1518T>C (p.His506=)）。位点1在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3662（1834/5008）、0.3783（45875/121256）、0.3739（93956/251276）、0.384（12025/31318）、0.3597（39061/108582）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=140757）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录20次BARD1蛋白第507位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V507M记录20次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。位点2在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.7706（3859/5008）、0.8134（98671/121304）、0.8169（205304/251312）、0.7661（23998/31326）、0.9258（100513/108568）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=183704）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接，根据序列保守性预测软件phastCons46、phyloP46判断该位置序列不保守。合并位点在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=215471）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录20次BARD1蛋白第507位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V507M记录20次。基于整合预测工具BayesDel认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The variant can be split into 2 loci, locus 1 (2-215632255-C-T, c.1519G>A (p.Val507Met)), and locus 2 (2-215632256-A-G, c.1518T>C (p.His506=)). The allele frequencies of locus 1 in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, and iJGVD database populations were 0.3662 (1834/5008), 0.3783 (45875/121256), 0.3739 (93956/251276), and 0.384 (12025/31318), respectively, 0.3597 (39061/108582); the ClinVar database reported the germline mutation classification of this variant (ID=140757) as Benign/Likely benign (with a reliability of two stars).The COSMIC database recorded 20 variants on amino acid position 507 of the BARD1 protein, with mutant type V507M recorded 20 times. Based on the integration prediction tool REVEL considered the variant as NEUTRAL and the splicing prediction software SpliceAI considered the variant as not affecting splicing. The allele frequencies of locus 2 in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database populations were 0.7706 (3859/5008), 0.8134 (98671/121304), 0.8169 (205304/251312), 0.7661 (23998/31326) , 0.9258 (100513/108568); the ClinVar database reported the germline mutation classification of this variant (ID=183704) as Benign (two stars for reliability). Based on the splicing prediction software SpliceAI, the variant was considered not to affect splicing, and the positional sequence was judged not to be conserved based on the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46, phyloP46.This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=215471) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 20 times of amino acid change at the BARD1 protein position 507, of which the mutant V507M is recorded 20 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 507th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Methionine.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.9022（4518/5008）、0.8731（105841/121224）、0.8735（219003/250730）、0.8708（27302/31352）、1.0（108568/108570）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=821892）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录56次MSH3蛋白第949位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q949R记录55次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0595（298/5008）、0.09467（2068/21844）、0.08829（13805/156354）、0.08001（2511/31382）、0.09561（10384/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道为Benign（ID=257485，可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录13次FANCI蛋白第877位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L记录13次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.0595(298/5008), 0.09467(2068/21844), 0.08829(13805/156354), 0.08001(2511/31382), 0.09561(10384/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as Benign in the ClinVar database(ID=257485, review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 13 times of amino acid change at the FANCI protein position 877, of which the mutant I877L is recorded 13 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0001594(5/31358), 0.0001197(13/108604) in the gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.001631(14/8584), 0.001687(31/18376) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe databases, 0.009709(2/206) in the EAS_CHB population of the 1000G database, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=329526) is Uncertain significance in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第231位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为蛋氨酸。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 231st amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Methionine.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6362（3186/5008）、0.5898（70723/119908）、0.5796（144875/249946）、0.6452（20195/31302）、0.471（51156/108604）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=256021）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接，根据序列保守性预测软件phastCons46、phyloP46判断该位置序列不保守。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.6362(3186/5008), 0.5898(70723/119908), 0.5796(144875/249946), 0.6452(20195/31302), 0.471(51156/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=256021) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing, according to the sequence conservation prediction software phastCons46 and phyloP46, the sequence at this position is not highly conserved.

The COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the ASXL1 protein position 815, of which the mutant L815P is recorded 15 times.
